_comment: Hand-curated seed catalog for the benchmark 5th entity type (lives next to benchmark-adapter.js; NOT in a data/ dir, which is gitignored). One row per Open LLM Leaderboard v2 sub-benchmark; leaderboard_col is the SINGLE source of truth, matching V2_COLUMNS in scripts/factory/benchmark-importer.js and the EVALUATED_ON edge target suffix (benchmark--openllm--<leaderboard_col>). Honest-contract: arxiv_id / hf_dataset_id are conf-1.0 ONLY where verifiable from the paper; null where not independently confirmed (never fabricated). All scores/provenance are 'as measured by Open LLM Leaderboard v2' — these rows describe the leaderboard sub-benchmark, not a generic re-implementation.
